Walk through the historical Jewish Quarter (Mellah).

Emerge into the legendary Jemaa el-Fnaa square as the evening vibe starts.

Explore the vivid blue streets and hidden architectural marvels perfect for photography.
Stop for a locally sourced goat cheese and olive tasting.
Visit the Spanish Mosque for panoramic views over the entire valley.

Enjoy a freshly grilled seafood lunch right by the ocean.

Beachside lunch featuring fresh local produce and relaxing by the ocean.
Free surf session or optional camel ride near the beach before returning.
Tour the colossal Atlas Film Studios, seeing sets from Gladiator, Cleopatra, and more.
